channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Drawing huge crowds, Bernie Sanders steps into leadership of the anti-Trump resistance
item.description: At 83 years old, Bernie Sanders has emerged as an unlikely leader of the Democratic resistance to Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Steve Peoples, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Tea Party movement finds a new champion in Trump
item.description: Tea Party stalwarts who have seen their movement fizzle are finding a new champion in President Trump and see his second administration as a culmination and validation of their efforts. Sen. Ron Johnson (R-Wis.), who gave his first political speech at a Tea Party rally in Oshkosh, Wis.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Air Force intercepts aircraft flying in a restricted zone near Mar-a-Lago
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Air Force fighter jets intercepted a civilian aircraft flying in the temporarily restricted airspace near Donald Trump's Florida home Sunday, bringing the number of violations to more than 20 since the president took office on Jan. 20.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden's 'autopen signature' appears on most official docs, raising concerns over who controlled the WH: report
item.description: President Biden's signature on official executive documents shows the same autopen signature, renewing concerns over his mental acuity, a report shows.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DOGE says $312M in loans were given to children during COVID pandemic
item.description: DOGE announced a further wave of contract terminations and said it has identified $312 million worth of loans issued to children aged 11 and younger.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump's speech to Congress ends notion that Dems are the 'compassionate' party after 92 years: expert
item.description: Former speechwriters for previous presidential administrations weighed in on President Donald Trump’s expansive speech before a joint session of Congress on Tuesday evening.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mayor Adams’ approval rating reaches record low ahead of election
item.description: NEW YORK CITY (PIX11) – The mayor’s race is heating up just as Mayor Eric Adams’ approval rating hits a new low, according to a new poll from Quinnipiac University. A new poll shows only 20% of voters approve of how Adams is handling his post, while 67% disapprove.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, PIX 11

item.title: Musk and DOGE try to slash government by cutting out those who answer to voters
item.description: Conservatives have long talked about cutting government, but Republicans in Congress have shied away from approving deep reductions because of fear of how voters would react.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Riccardi, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump's transactional approach to diplomacy is a driving force on the world stage
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Donald Trump, the real estate developer turned commander in chief, is laying bare his style of diplomacy in the early weeks of his new term: It’s a whole lot like a high-stakes business deal, and his No. 1 goal is to come out of the transaction on top.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump-district Democrats face risky vote on GOP spending bill
item.description: House Democrats in districts carried by President Trump are confronting a potentially risky vote next week when GOP leaders are expected to put their partisan government funding bill on the floor.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lillis, NewsNation

item.title: Minnesota lawmakers consider allowing heavier ATVs
item.description: The ATV industry says consumer preferences are shifting toward larger side-by-side vehicles. Some environmental groups question whether heavier vehicles could cause more trail damage.
item.dc:creator: Kirsti Marohn, MPR News

item.title: Al Green censure highlights increased appetite for retribution in House
item.description: A formal House reprimand didn't contain the fallout from Rep. Al Green (D-Texas) interrupting President Trump’s speech to Congress, showing how petty fights and demands for retribution have become an increasingly prominent part of business on the House floor.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: House Republicans unveil bill to avoid shutdown and they're daring Democrats to oppose it
item.description: House Republicans have unveiled a 99-page spending bill that would keep federal agencies funded through Sept. 30. It would provide a slight boost to defense programs while trimming nondefense programs below 2024 budget year levels.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Tribes and Native American students sue over Bureau of Indian Education firings
item.description: NORMAN, Okla. (AP) — Three tribal nations and five Native American students say in a lawsuit that the Trump administration has failed its legal obligations to tribes when it cut jobs at Bureau of Indian Education schools.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM LEE BREWER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump order denies student loan relief to nonprofit workers engaged in 'improper' activity
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump is ordering changes to the Public Service Loan Forgiveness program that would disqualify workers of nonprofit groups deemed to have engaged in “improper” activities.
item.dc:creator: COLLIN BINKLEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Republican lawmakers hold telephone town halls as protesters demand more
item.description: HOLLAND, Mich. (AP) — Protesters demanding an in-person town hall from their western Michigan GOP congressman chanted loudly Friday as honking drivers signaled support, disrupting the usual calm of a conservative family vacation town. Mere hours later, Rep. Bill Huizenga held a town hall — by phone.
item.dc:creator: JOEY CAPPELLETTI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Leland Vittert’s War Notes: Singing Into Irrelevancy
item.description: Gump logic: Forrest Gump’s mama was right – stupid is as stupid does. ICYMI: For those that don't know, ICYMI is how the cool kids say “In case you missed it.” Sibling shoutout: The smarter and more talented Vittert child – aka my sister, Liberty – is out with a must-read in The Hill.
item.dc:creator: Leland Vittert, NewsNation

item.title: Protesters denounce ICE arrests at St. Louis Park manufacturing facility
item.description: Dozens of people gathered outside a St. Louis Park aluminum finishing facility Wednesday night to protest recent federal immigration arrests at the company.
item.dc:creator: Estelle Timar-Wilcox and Regina Medina, MPR News

item.title: Top Democrats ask Rubio for answers on now-canceled $400 million Tesla plan
item.description: A letter from two House Democrats presses Rubio for details about who approved an effort to try to use hundreds of millions of dollars of taxpayer money on armored electric vehicles from Tesla.
item.dc:creator: Bobby Allyn, MPR News

item.title: What to know about Social Security office closures driven by Musk's DOGE
item.description: Across-the-board cuts at the Social Security Administration are prompting questions about how the benefits of millions of recipients may be affected. Among the potential changes are layoffs for more than 10% of the agency’s workforce and the closure of dozens of offices throughout the U.S.
item.dc:creator: MEG KINNARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: War heroes and military firsts are among 26,000 images flagged for removal in Pentagon's DEI purge
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — References to a World War II Medal of Honor recipient, the Enola Gay aircraft that dropped an atomic bomb on Japan and the first women to pass Marine infantry training are among the tens of thousands of photos and online posts marked for deletion as the Defense Department works to
item.dc:creator: TARA COPP, LOLITA C. BALDOR and KEVIN VINEYS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tim Scott unveils bill targeting debanking
item.description: Debanking — the closure of accounts that banks consider risky, often with little notice or explanation — has become a key issue for Republicans.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, NewsNation

item.title: Tariffs not the way Trump should slow fentanyl flow: Bolton
item.description: "American importers pay the tariffs and then do everything they can to pass that cost on to American consumers," John Bolton said.
item.dc:creator: Markie Martin, NewsNation

item.title: Bill to pay troops during shutdown filed as funding deadline looms
item.description: Rep. Jen Kiggans (R-Va.) reintroduced a bill Thursday to ensure that members of the military get paid during a government shutdown, a move that comes as a March 14 deadline ticks closer without a deal to extend funding.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: San Diego Congress member pushes Trump for Nobel Peace Prize
item.description: A San Diego congressional representative is pressing the Norwegian committee who awards the prestigious Nobel Prizes to consider President Donald Trump to be the 2025 recipient of the peace prize.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: DeSantis' State of the State: government accountability a key focus
item.description: Gov. Ron DeSantis gave his state of the state address Tuesday and offered his plan for the year ahead. Members of the legislature, and leaders past and present gathered in Tallahassee for the speech Tuesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Emboldened Trump praises his 'swift action' in address to Congress
item.description: President Donald Trump will stand before a joint session of Congress on Tuesday to give an accounting of his turbulent first weeks in office as a divided nation struggles to keep pace, with some Americans fearing for the country's future while others are cheering him on.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 46 percent say Trump changing economy for the worse: Survey
item.description: Recent polling has indicated that U.S. adults’ confidence in Trump’s ability to manage the country’s economy — the top issue in the 2024 presidential election — has been slipping.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WFLA, NBC

item.title: LA Times to give op-eds AI-generated political rating, list of alternate views
item.description: The Los Angeles Times has launched an AI-driven "bias meter" to provide readers with alternative perspectives on opinion content.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Crisp, Fox 5

item.title: Trump trade war intensifies as tariffs go into place
item.description: Americans awoke on Tuesday morning to an intensifying trade war, as President Donald Trump’s newest tariffs on Canadian, Mexican and Chinese imports were imposed and those countries quickly moved to retaliate.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: 5 things to watch as Trump delivers joint address to Congress
item.description: President Trump will head to the Capitol on Tuesday for the first joint address of his second term emboldened by a month of mass federal agency slashing, shocking foreign policy moves and a dizzying array of executive actions that have disrupted Washington and beyond.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Bondi says she was misled on Epstein documents
item.description: Attorney General Pam Bondi says she was misled into believing she had all the files related to the Epstein investigations, and is now seeking additional information from the FBI.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Crisp, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Wisconsin audit of Trump win finds not a single voting machine error
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — An audit of the November election won by President Donald Trump in swing-state Wisconsin found that not a single vote was counted incorrectly, altered or missed by tabulating machines.
item.dc:creator: SCOTT BAUER, Associated Press, Fox 5
